name: qa-focus
description: Control-first agentic QA on the Copilot SDK + Playwright: an autonomous explorer that discovers, and a gated codifier that hardens findings into standards-compliant durable tests.

scripts.doctor: C="${COOKBOOK:-$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cookbook}"; if [ -d "$C/recipes" ]; then for r in core quality security issues loop contracts release; do bash "$C/recipes/$r/scripts/doctor.sh" .; done; else echo 'recipe-doctor: set COOKBOOK to the cookbook plugin dir to run conformance checks (skipped)'; fi
